◎简　　介  

　　Follow one single-minded immigrant’s improbable journey from Puerto Rico to the halls of power. Witness Luis Miranda's unflappable idealism as he battles his health, mobilizes the mainland Latinx community, matches wits with his youngest child applying to college and brings Hamilton to his island home, all in 12 months. Cast: Luis Miranda, Lin-Manuel Miranda.
